title: Lisa Yoho
compiled_truth: Lisa Yoho is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-25 to 2001-12-03), Lisa Yoho sent 142 and received 625 emails, totalling 767 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (97), [Chris Long](people/chris-long) (18), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (15), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (15), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (13). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_mid_year_prc, 2001_objectives, 2002_budget, _americas, archive, cftc.
